revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

{{神社 |名称 = 産土神社 |画像 = [[File:Ubusuna-jinja01.jpg|300px]] |所在地 = 大阪府大阪市此花区島屋3-13-28 {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|40|34.6|N|135|26|28.7|E|region:JP}} |祭神 = [[天照大神|天照皇大神]]・[[住吉三神|住吉大神]]・[[ウカノミタマ|宇迦之御魂神]] |社格 = 旧村社 |創建 = [[宝暦]]12年（[[1762年]]） |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月16日 |神事 = }}
'''産土神社'''（うぶすなじんじゃ)）は[[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[此花区]]島屋に鎮座する[[神社]]。
== 祭神 == * [[天照大神|天照皇大神]] * [[住吉三神|住吉大神]] * [[ウカノミタマ|宇迦之御魂神]]
== 歴史 == [[File:Ubusuna-jinja02.jpg|300px|thumb|拝殿]] * [[宝暦]]12年（[[1762年]]）島屋市兵衛が新田開発のため勧請。 * [[明治]]5年（[[1872年]]）村社に列す。 * [[明治]]44年（[[1911年]]）8月7日恩貴島北之町（酉島町）の皇太神宮を合祀。この宮は[[元禄]]15年（[[1702年]]）大宮仁右ヱ門が恩貴島新田を開拓するに当り、奉斎されたもの。 * [[大正]]4年（[[1915年]]）11月神饌幣帛料供進社に指定される。 * [[昭和]]9年（[[1934年]]）9月21日の[[室戸台風]]で損失したため、[[正蓮寺川]]南岸の旧地より現在地に遷座。
== 境内 == * 金比羅神社 * 島屋稲荷神社 * 祖霊社 * 斎火産霊大神 * 神祠 * 楠根稲荷大神
== 交通アクセス == * [[桜島線|JRゆめ咲線]][[安治川口駅]]より、北へ徒歩6分。
== 出典 == * 井上正雄 『大阪府全志』 （1922）{{全国書誌番号|73012615}} * 大阪府神道青年会 『大阪府神社名鑑』 （1971）[http://iss.ndl.go.jp/books/R100000001-I002040239-00 国立国会図書館サーチ]
{{DEFAULTSORT:うふすなしんしあ}} [[Category:大阪市の神社]] [[Category:大阪府の旧村社]] [[Category:此花区]] {{Shinto-stub}}

revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 産土神社 |画像 = [[File:Ubusuna-jinja01.jpg|300px]] |所在地 = 大阪府大阪市此花区島屋3-13-28 {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|40|34.6|N|135|26|28.7|E|region:JP}} |祭神 = [[天照大神|天照皇大神]]・[[住吉三神|住吉大神]]・[[ウカノミタマ|宇迦之御魂神]] |社格 = 旧村社 |創建 = [[宝暦]]12年（[[1762年]]） |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月16日 |神事 = }}
'''産土神社'''（うぶすなじんじゃ)）は[[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[此花区]]島屋に鎮座する[[神社]]。
== 祭神 == * [[天照大神|天照皇大神]] * [[住吉三神|住吉大神]] * [[ウカノミタマ|宇迦之御魂神]]
== 歴史 == [[File:Ubusuna-jinja02.jpg|300px|thumb|拝殿]] * [[宝暦]]12年（[[1762年]]）島屋市兵衛が新田開発のため勧請。 * [[明治]]5年（[[1872年]]）村社に列す。 * [[明治]]44年（[[1911年]]）8月7日恩貴島北之町（酉島町）の皇太神宮を合祀。この宮は[[元禄]]15年（[[1702年]]）大宮仁右ヱ門が恩貴島新田を開拓するに当り、奉斎されたもの。 * [[大正]]4年（[[1915年]]）11月神饌幣帛料供進社に指定される。 * [[昭和]]9年（[[1934年]]）9月21日の[[室戸台風]]で損失したため、[[正蓮寺川]]南岸の旧地より現在地に遷座。
== 境内 == * 金比羅神社 * 島屋稲荷神社 * 祖霊社 * 斎火産霊大神 * 神祠 * 楠根稲荷大神
== 交通アクセス == * [[桜島線|JRゆめ咲線]][[安治川口駅]]より、北へ徒歩6分。
== 出典 == * 井上正雄 『大阪府全志』 （1922）{{全国書誌番号|73012615}} * 大阪府神道青年会 『大阪府神社名鑑』 （1971）[http://iss.ndl.go.jp/books/R100000001-I002040239-00 国立国会図書館サーチ]

== 歴史 == [[File:Ubusuna-jinja02.jpg|300px|thumb|拝殿]] * [[宝暦]]12年（[[1762年]]）島屋市兵衛が新田開発のため勧請。 * [[明治]]5年（[[1872年]]）村社に列す。 * [[明治]]44年（[[1911年]]）8月7日恩貴島北之町（酉島町）の皇太神宮を合祀。この宮は[[元禄]]15年（[[1702年]]）大宮仁右ヱ門が[[恩貴島|恩貴島新田]]を開拓するに当り、奉斎されたもの。 * [[大正]]4年（[[1915年]]）11月神饌幣帛料供進社に指定される。 * [[昭和]]9年（[[1934年]]）9月21日の[[室戸台風]]で損失したため、[[正蓮寺川]]南岸の旧地より現在地に遷座。

== 交通アクセス == * [[桜島線|JRゆめ咲線]][[安治川口駅]]より、北へ徒歩6分。
== 出典 == * 井上正雄 『大阪府全志』 （1922）{{全国書誌番号|73012615}} * 大阪府神道青年会 『大阪府神社名鑑』 （1971）[http://iss.ndl.go.jp/books/R100000001-I002040239-00 国立国会図書館サーチ] {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うふすなしんしあ}} [[Category:大阪市の神社]] [[Category:大阪府の旧村社]] [[Category:此花区の歴史]] {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:此花区の建築物]]

{{Shrine | Name = Ubusuna Shrine | Image = [[File:Ubusuna-jinja01.jpg|270px]] | Location = Shimaya 3-13-28, [[Konohana Ward]], [[Osaka City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]] {{Coord|34|40|34.6|N|135|26|28.7|E|region:JP-27_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Ubusuna Shrine (Konohana Ward, Osaka)}} | Deity = [[Amaterasu-Ōmikami]] • [[Sumiyoshi Sanjin|Sumiyoshi Ōkami]] • [[Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto]] | Shrine rank = Former Village Shrine (旧村社) | Foundation = [[Hōreki]] 12 (1762) | Main hall = | Alternate names = | Annual festival = October 16 }}
'''Ubusuna Shrine''' (産土神社, Ubusuna Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in [[Shimaya]], [[Konohana Ward]], [[Osaka City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]].
== Deities == * [[Amaterasu-Ōmikami]] (天照皇大神) * [[Sumiyoshi Sanjin|Sumiyoshi Ōkami]] (住吉大神) * [[Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto]] (宇迦之御魂神)
== History == [[File:Ubusuna-jinja02.jpg|300px|thumb|Worship hall]] * Founded in [[Hōreki]] 12 (1762) by Shimaya Shibee for the purpose of reclamation. * In [[Meiji]] 5 (1872), designated as a village shrine. * On August 7, [[Meiji]] 44 (1911), the Kōdai Jingū in Onkishima Kitano-chō (Torijima-chō) was merged. This shrine had been enshrined in [[Genroku]] 15 (1702) by Ōmiya Jin'emon during the reclamation of Onkishima Shinden. * In [[Taishō]] 4 (1915), it was designated as a shrine eligible to receive imperial offerings. * On September 21, [[Shōwa]] 9 (1934), following damage caused by the [[Muroto Typhoon]], the shrine was relocated from its original site on the southern bank of the Shōrenji River to its current location.
== Grounds == * Konpira Shrine * Shimaya Inari Shrine * Ancestral Spirits Shrine * Ikumusubi-no-Ōkami * Sacred Shrine * Kusune Inari Ōkami
== Access == * Approximately 6 minutes on foot north from [[Ajigawa-guchi Station]] on the {{ill|JR Yumesaki Line|ja|桜島線}}.
== References == * Inoue Masao, *Osaka Prefecture Complete History* (1922) {{全国書誌番号|73012615}} * Osaka Prefecture Shinto Youth Association, *Osaka Prefecture Shrine Directory* (1971) [http://iss.ndl.go.jp/books/R100000001-I002040239-00 National Diet Library Search] {{Shinto side}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ubusuna Shrine}} [[Category:Shrines in Osaka City]] [[Category:Former Village Shrines in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Konohana Ward]] {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:Buildings in Konohana Ward]] [[Category:Images]] [[Category:new shrine redirects to break]] [[Category:産土神社 (大阪市此花区)]][[ja:産土神社 (大阪市此花区)]]

{{神社 |名称=産土神社 |画像=[[File:Ubusuna-jinja01.jpg|270px]] |所在地=大阪府大阪市此花区島屋3-13-28 {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|40|34.6|N|135|26|28.7|E|region:JP-27_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=産土神社 (大阪市此花区)}} |祭神=[[天照大神|天照皇大神]]・[[住吉三神|住吉大神]]・[[ウカノミタマ|宇迦之御魂神]] |社格=旧村社 |創建=[[宝暦]]12年（[[1762年]]） |本殿= |別名= |札所等= |例祭=10月16日 |神事= }}
'''産土神社'''（うぶすなじんじゃ）は[[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[此花区]][[島屋]]に鎮座する[[神社]]。
== 祭神 == * [[天照大神|天照皇大神]] * [[住吉三神|住吉大神]] * [[ウカノミタマ|宇迦之御魂神]]
== 歴史 == [[File:Ubusuna-jinja02.jpg|300px|thumb|拝殿]] * [[宝暦]]12年（[[1762年]]）島屋市兵衛が新田開発のため勧請。 * [[明治]]5年（[[1872年]]）村社に列す。 * [[明治]]44年（[[1911年]]）8月7日恩貴島北之町（酉島町）の皇太神宮を合祀。この宮は[[元禄]]15年（[[1702年]]）大宮仁右ヱ門が恩貴島新田を開拓するに当り、奉斎されたもの。 * [[大正]]4年（[[1915年]]）11月神饌幣帛料供進社に指定される。 * [[昭和]]9年（[[1934年]]）9月21日の[[室戸台風]]で損失したため、[[正蓮寺川]]南岸の旧地より現在地に遷座。
== 境内 == * 金比羅神社 * 島屋稲荷神社 * 祖霊社 * 斎火産霊大神 * 神祠 * 楠根稲荷大神
== 交通アクセス == * [[桜島線|JRゆめ咲線]][[安治川口駅]]より、北へ徒歩6分。
== 出典 == * 井上正雄 『大阪府全志』 （1922）{{全国書誌番号|73012615}} * 大阪府神道青年会 『大阪府神社名鑑』 （1971）[http://iss.ndl.go.jp/books/R100000001-I002040239-00 国立国会図書館サーチ] {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うふすなしんしあ}} [[Category:大阪市の神社]] [[Category:大阪府の旧村社]] [[Category:此花区の歴史]] {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:此花区の建築物]]

{{Shrine | name = Ubusuna Shrine | image = [[File:Ubusuna-jinja01.jpg|270px]] | location = Shimaya 3-13-28, [[Konohana Ward]], [[Osaka City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]] {{Coord|34|40|34.6|N|135|26|28.7|E|region:JP-27_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Ubusuna Shrine (Konohana Ward, Osaka)}} | Deity = [[Amaterasu-Ōmikami]] • [[Sumiyoshi Sanjin|Sumiyoshi Ōkami]] • [[Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto]] | Shrine rank = Former Village Shrine (旧村社) | Foundation = [[Hōreki]] 12 (1762) | Main hall = | Alternate names = | Annual festival = October 16 }}
'''Ubusuna Shrine''' (産土神社, Ubusuna Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in [[Shimaya]], [[Konohana Ward]], [[Osaka City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]].
== Deities == * [[Amaterasu-Ōmikami]] (天照皇大神) * [[Sumiyoshi Sanjin|Sumiyoshi Ōkami]] (住吉大神) * [[Ukanomitama|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto]] (宇迦之御魂神)
== History == [[File:Ubusuna-jinja02.jpg|300px|thumb|Worship hall]] * consecration_year in [[Hōreki]] 12 (1762) by Shimaya Shibee for the purpose of reclamation. * In [[Meiji]] 5 (1872), designated as a village shrine. * On August 7, [[Meiji]] 44 (1911), the Kōdai Jingū in Onkishima Kitano-chō (Torijima-chō) was merged. This shrine had been enshrined in [[Genroku]] 15 (1702) by Ōmiya Jin'emon during the reclamation of Onkishima Shinden. * In [[Taishō]] 4 (1915), it was designated as a shrine eligible to receive imperial offerings. * On September 21, [[Shōwa]] 9 (1934), following damage caused by the [[Muroto Typhoon]], the shrine was relocated from its original site on the southern bank of the Shōrenji River to its current location.
== Grounds == * Konpira Shrine * Shimaya Inari Shrine * Ancestral Spirits Shrine * Ikumusubi-no-Ōkami * Sacred Shrine * Kusune Inari Ōkami
== Access == * Approximately 6 minutes on foot north from [[Ajigawa-guchi Station]] on the {{ill|JR Yumesaki Line|ja|桜島線}}.
== References == * Inoue Masao, *Osaka Prefecture Complete History* (1922) {{全国書誌番号|73012615}} * Osaka Prefecture Shinto Youth Association, *Osaka Prefecture Shrine Directory* (1971) [http://iss.ndl.go.jp/books/R100000001-I002040239-00 National Diet Library Search] {{Shinto side}} {{citation needed|Ubusuna Shrine}} [[Category:Shrines in Osaka City]] [[Category:Former Village Shrines in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Konohana Ward]] {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:Buildings in Konohana Ward]] [[Category:産土神社 (大阪市此花区)]] [[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Ubusuna Shrine (Konohana, Osaka)}}[[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[Category:bump 1-25]] [[ja:産土神社 (大阪市此花区)]]

This shrine had been enshrined in [[Genroku]] 15 (1702) by Ōmiya Jin'emon during the reclamation of Onkishima Shinden. * In [[Taishō]] 4 (1915), it was designated as a shrine eligible to receive imperial offerings. * On September 21, [[Shōwa]] 9 (1934), following damage caused by the [[Muroto Typhoon]], the shrine was relocated from its original site on the southern bank of the Shōrenji River to its current location.
== Grounds == * Konpira Shrine * Shimaya Inari Shrine * Ancestral Spirits Shrine * Ikumusubi-no-Ōkami * Sacred Shrine * Kusune Inari Ōkami

{{神社 |名称=産土神社 |画像=[[File:Ubusuna-jinja01.jpg|270px]] |所在地=大阪府大阪市此花区島屋3-13-28 {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|40|34.6|N|135|26|28.7|E|region:JP-27_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=産土神社 (大阪市此花区)}} |祭神=[[天照大神|天照皇大神]]・[[住吉三神|住吉大神]]・[[ウカノミタマ|宇迦之御魂神]] |社格=旧村社 |創建=[[宝暦]]12年（[[1762年]]） |本殿= |別名= |札所等= |例祭=10月16日 |神事= }}
'''産土神社'''（うぶすなじんじゃ）は[[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[此花区]][[島屋]]に鎮座する[[神社]]。
== 祭神 == * [[天照大神|天照皇大神]] * [[住吉三神|住吉大神]] * [[ウカノミタマ|宇迦之御魂神]]
== 歴史 == [[File:Ubusuna-jinja02.jpg|300px|thumb|拝殿]] * [[宝暦]]12年（[[1762年]]）島屋市兵衛が新田開発のため勧請。 * [[明治]]5年（[[1872年]]）村社に列す。 * [[明治]]44年（[[1911年]]）8月7日恩貴島北之町（酉島町）の皇太神宮を合祀。この宮は[[元禄]]15年（[[1702年]]）大宮仁右ヱ門が[[恩貴島|恩貴島新田]]を開拓するに当り、奉斎されたもの。 * [[大正]]4年（[[1915年]]）11月神饌幣帛料供進社に指定される。 * [[昭和]]9年（[[1934年]]）9月21日の[[室戸台風]]で損失したため、[[正蓮寺川]]南岸の旧地より現在地に遷座。
== 境内 == * 金比羅神社 * 島屋稲荷神社 * 祖霊社 * 斎火産霊大神 * 神祠 * 楠根稲荷大神
== 交通アクセス == * [[桜島線|JRゆめ咲線]][[安治川口駅]]より、北へ徒歩6分。
== 出典 == * 井上正雄 『大阪府全志』 （1922）{{全国書誌番号|73012615}} * 大阪府神道青年会 『大阪府神社名鑑』 （1971）[http://iss.ndl.go.jp/books/R100000001-I002040239-00 国立国会図書館サーチ] {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うふすなしんしあ}} [[Category:大阪市の神社]] [[Category:大阪府の旧村社]] [[Category:此花区の歴史]] {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:此花区の建築物]]

'''産土神社'''（うぶすなじんじゃ）は[[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[此花区]][[島屋]]に鎮座する[[神社]]。
== 祭神 == * [[天照大神|天照皇大神]] * [[住吉三神|住吉大神]] * [[ウカノミタマ|宇迦之御魂神]]
== 歴史 == [[File:Ubusuna-jinja02.jpg|300px|thumb|拝殿]] * [[宝暦]]12年（[[1762年]]）島屋市兵衛が新田開発のため勧請。 * [[明治]]5年（[[1872年]]）村社に列す。 * [[明治]]44年（[[1911年]]）8月7日恩貴島北之町（酉島町）の皇太神宮を合祀。この宮は[[元禄]]15年（[[1702年]]）大宮仁右ヱ門が[[恩貴島|恩貴島新田]]を開拓するに当り、奉斎されたもの。 * [[大正]]4年（[[1915年]]）11月神饌幣帛料供進社に指定される。 * [[昭和]]9年（[[1934年]]）9月21日の[[室戸台風]]で損失したため、[[正蓮寺川]]南岸の旧地より現在地に遷座。
== 境内 == * 金比羅神社 * 島屋稲荷神社 * 祖霊社 * 斎火産霊大神 * 神祠 * 楠根稲荷大神
== 交通アクセス == * [[桜島線|JRゆめ咲線]][[安治川口駅]]より、北へ徒歩6分。
== 出典 == * 井上正雄 『大阪府全志』 （1922）{{全国書誌番号|73012615}} * 大阪府神道青年会 『大阪府神社名鑑』 （1971）[http://iss.ndl.go.jp/books/R100000001-I002040239-00 国立国会図書館サーチ] {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うふすなしんしあ}} [[Category:大阪市の神社]] [[Category:大阪府の旧村社]] [[Category:此花区の歴史]] {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:此花区の建築物]]

{{Shrine | name = Ubusuna Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Ubusuna-jinja01.jpg|270px]] | location = Shimaya 3-13-28, [[Konohana Ward]], [[Osaka City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]] {{Coord|34|40|34.6|N|135|26|28.7|E|region:JP-27_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Ubusuna Shrine (Konohana Ward, Osaka)}} | Deity = [[Amaterasu-Ōmikami]] • [[Sumiyoshi Sanjin|Sumiyoshi Ōkami]] • [[Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto]] | Shrine rank = Former Village Shrine (旧村社) | Foundation = [[Hōreki]] 12 (1762) | Main hall = | Alternate names = | Annual festival = October 16 }}
'''Ubusuna Shrine''' (産土神社, Ubusuna Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in [[Shimaya]], [[Konohana Ward]], [[Osaka City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]].
== Deities == * [[Amaterasu-Ōmikami]] (天照皇大神) * [[Sumiyoshi Sanjin|Sumiyoshi Ōkami]] (住吉大神) * [[Ukanomitama|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto]] (宇迦之御魂神)
== History == [[File:Ubusuna-jinja02.jpg|300px|thumb|Worship hall]] * consecration_year in [[Hōreki]] 12 (1762) by Shimaya Shibee for the purpose of reclamation. * In [[Meiji]] 5 (1872), designated as a village shrine. * On August 7, [[Meiji]] 44 (1911), the Kōdai Jingū in Onkishima Kitano-chō (Torijima-chō) was merged. This shrine had been enshrined in [[Genroku]] 15 (1702) by Ōmiya Jin'emon during the reclamation of Onkishima Shinden. * In [[Taishō]] 4 (1915), it was designated as a shrine eligible to receive imperial offerings. * On September 21, [[Shōwa]] 9 (1934), following damage caused by the [[Muroto Typhoon]], the shrine was relocated from its original site on the southern bank of the Shōrenji River to its current location.
== Grounds == * Konpira Shrine * Shimaya Inari Shrine * Ancestral Spirits Shrine * Ikumusubi-no-Ōkami * Sacred Shrine * Kusune Inari Ōkami
== Access == * Approximately 6 minutes on foot north from [[Ajigawa-guchi Station]] on the {{ill|JR Yumesaki Line|ja|桜島線}}.
== References == * Inoue Masao, *Osaka Prefecture Complete History* (1922) {{全国書誌番号|73012615}} * Osaka Prefecture Shinto Youth Association, *Osaka Prefecture Shrine Directory* (1971) [http://iss.ndl.go.jp/books/R100000001-I002040239-00 National Diet Library Search] {{Shinto side}} {{citation needed|Ubusuna Shrine}} [[Category:Shrines in Osaka City]] [[Category:Former Village Shrines in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Konohana Ward]] {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:Buildings in Konohana Ward]] [[Category:産土神社 (大阪市此花区)]] [[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Ubusuna Shrine (Konohana, Osaka)}}[[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:Ubusuna Shrine (Konohana, Osaka)]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[Category:bump 1-25]] [[ja:産土神社 (大阪市此花区)]]

'''Ubusuna Shrine''' (産土神社, Ubusuna Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in [[Shimaya]], [[Konohana Ward]], [[Osaka City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]].
== Deities == * [[Amaterasu-Ōmikami]] (天照皇大神) * [[Sumiyoshi Sanjin|Sumiyoshi Ōkami]] (住吉大神) * [[Ukanomitama|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto]] (宇迦之御魂神)
== History == [[File:Ubusuna-jinja02.jpg|300px|thumb|Worship hall]] * consecration_year in [[Hōreki]] 12 (1762) by Shimaya Shibee for the purpose of reclamation. * In [[Meiji]] 5 (1872), designated as a village shrine. * On August 7, [[Meiji]] 44 (1911), the Kōdai Jingū in Onkishima Kitano-chō (Torijima-chō) was merged. This shrine had been enshrined in [[Genroku]] 15 (1702) by Ōmiya Jin'emon during the reclamation of Onkishima Shinden. * In [[Taishō]] 4 (1915), it was designated as a shrine eligible to receive imperial offerings. * On September 21, [[Shōwa]] 9 (1934), following damage caused by the [[Muroto Typhoon]], the shrine was relocated from its original site on the southern bank of the Shōrenji River to its current location.
== Grounds == * Konpira Shrine * Shimaya Inari Shrine * Ancestral Spirits Shrine * Ikumusubi-no-Ōkami * Sacred Shrine * Kusune Inari Ōkami
== Access == * Approximately 6 minutes on foot north from [[Ajigawa-guchi Station]] on the {{ill|JR Yumesaki Line|ja|桜島線}}.
== References == * Inoue Masao, *Osaka Prefecture Complete History* (1922) {{全国書誌番号|73012615}} * Osaka Prefecture Shinto Youth Association, *Osaka Prefecture Shrine Directory* (1971) {{神社 |名称=産土神社 |画像=[[File:Ubusuna-jinja01.jpg|270px]] |所在地=大阪府大阪市此花区島屋3-13-28 {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|40|34.6|N|135|26|28.7|E|region:JP-27_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=産土神社 (大阪市此花区)}} |祭神=[[天照大神|天照皇大神]]・[[住吉三神|住吉大神]]・[[ウカノミタマ|宇迦之御魂神]] |社格=旧村社 |創建=[[宝暦]]12年（[[1762年]]） |本殿= |別名= |札所等= |例祭=10月16日 |神事= }}
'''産土神社'''（うぶすなじんじゃ）は[[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[此花区]][[島屋]]に鎮座する[[神社]]。
== 祭神 == * [[天照大神|天照皇大神]] * [[住吉三神|住吉大神]] * [[ウカノミタマ|宇迦之御魂神]]
== 歴史 == [[File:Ubusuna-jinja02.jpg|300px|thumb|拝殿]] * [[宝暦]]12年（[[1762年]]）島屋市兵衛が新田開発のため勧請。 * [[明治]]5年（[[1872年]]）村社に列す。 * [[明治]]44年（[[1911年]]）8月7日恩貴島北之町（酉島町）の皇太神宮を合祀。この宮は[[元禄]]15年（[[1702年]]）大宮仁右ヱ門が[[恩貴島|恩貴島新田]]を開拓するに当り、奉斎されたもの。 * [[大正]]4年（[[1915年]]）11月神饌幣帛料供進社に指定される。 * [[昭和]]9年（[[1934年]]）9月21日の[[室戸台風]]で損失したため、[[正蓮寺川]]南岸の旧地より現在地に遷座。
== 境内 == * 金比羅神社 * 島屋稲荷神社 * 祖霊社 * 斎火産霊大神 * 神祠 * 楠根稲荷大神
== 交通アクセス == * [[桜島線|JRゆめ咲線]][[安治川口駅]]より、北へ徒歩6分。
== 出典 == * 井上正雄 『大阪府全志』 （1922）{{全国書誌番号|73012615}} * 大阪府神道青年会 『大阪府神社名鑑』 （1971）[http://iss.ndl.go.jp/books/R100000001-I002040239-00 国立国会図書館サーチ] {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うふすなしんしあ}} [[Category:大阪市の神社]] [[Category:大阪府の旧村社]] [[Category:此花区の歴史]] {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:此花区の建築物]]

{{Shrine | name = Ubusuna Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Ubusuna-jinja01.jpg|270px]] | location = Shimaya 3-13-28, [[Konohana Ward]], [[Osaka City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]] {{Coord|34|40|34.6|N|135|26|28.7|E|region:JP-27_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Ubusuna Shrine (Konohana Ward, Osaka)}} | deity = [[Amaterasu-Ōmikami]] • [[Sumiyoshi Sanjin|Sumiyoshi Ōkami]] • [[Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto]] | Shrine rank = Former Village Shrine (旧村社) | Foundation = [[Hōreki]] 12 (1762) | Main hall = | Alternate names = | Annual festival = October 16 }}
'''Ubusuna Shrine''' (産土神社, Ubusuna Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in [[Shimaya]], [[Konohana Ward]], [[Osaka City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]].
== Deities == * [[Amaterasu-Ōmikami]] (天照皇大神) * [[Sumiyoshi Sanjin|Sumiyoshi Ōkami]] (住吉大神) * [[Ukanomitama|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto]] (宇迦之御魂神)
== History == [[File:Ubusuna-jinja02.jpg|300px|thumb|Worship hall]] * consecration_year in [[Hōreki]] 12 (1762) by Shimaya Shibee for the purpose of reclamation. * In [[Meiji]] 5 (1872), designated as a village shrine. * On August 7, [[Meiji]] 44 (1911), the Kōdai Jingū in Onkishima Kitano-chō (Torijima-chō) was merged. This shrine had been enshrined in [[Genroku]] 15 (1702) by Ōmiya Jin'emon during the reclamation of Onkishima Shinden. * In [[Taishō]] 4 (1915), it was designated as a shrine eligible to receive imperial offerings. * On September 21, [[Shōwa]] 9 (1934), following damage caused by the [[Muroto Typhoon]], the shrine was relocated from its original site on the southern bank of the Shōrenji River to its current location.
== Grounds == * Konpira Shrine * Shimaya Inari Shrine * Ancestral Spirits Shrine * Ikumusubi-no-Ōkami * Sacred Shrine * Kusune Inari Ōkami
== Access == * Approximately 6 minutes on foot north from [[Ajigawa-guchi Station]] on the {{ill|JR Yumesaki Line|ja|桜島線}}.
== References == * Inoue Masao, *Osaka Prefecture Complete History* (1922) {{全国書誌番号|73012615}} * Osaka Prefecture Shinto Youth Association, *Osaka Prefecture Shrine Directory* (1971) [http://iss.ndl.go.jp/books/R100000001-I002040239-00 National Diet Library Search] {{Shinto side}} {{citation needed|Ubusuna Shrine}} [[Category:Shrines in Osaka City]] [[Category:Former Village '''Ubusuna Shrine''' (産土神社, Ubusuna Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in [[Shimaya]], [[Konohana Ward]], [[Osaka City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]].
== Deities == * [[Amaterasu-Ōmikami]] (天照皇大神) * [[Sumiyoshi Sanjin|Sumiyoshi Ōkami]] (住吉大神) * [[Ukanomitama|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto]] (宇迦之御魂神)
== History == [[File:Ubusuna-jinja02.jpg|300px|thumb|Worship hall]] * consecration_year in [[Hōreki]] 12 (1762) by Shimaya Shibee for the purpose of reclamation. * In [[Meiji]] 5 (1872), designated as a village shrine. * On August 7, [[Meiji]] 44 (1911), the Kōdai Jingū in Onkishima Kitano-chō (Torijima-chō) was merged. This shrine had been enshrined in [[Genroku]] 15 (1702) by Ōmiya Jin'emon during the reclamation of Onkishima Shinden. * In [[Taishō]] 4 (1915), it was designated as a shrine eligible to receive imperial offerings. * On September 21, [[Shōwa]] 9 (1934), following damage caused by the [[Muroto Typhoon]], the shrine was relocated from its original site on the southern bank of the Shōrenji River to its current location.
== Grounds == * Konpira Shrine * Shimaya Inari Shrine * Ancestral Spirits Shrine * Ikumusubi-no-Ōkami * Sacred Shrine * Kusune Inari Ōkami
== Access == * Approximately 6 minutes on foot north from [[Ajigawa-guchi Station]] on the {{ill|JR Yumesaki Line|ja|桜島線}}.

{{Shrine | name = Ubusuna Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Ubusuna-jinja01.jpg|270px]] | location = Shimaya 3-13-28, [[Konohana Ward]], [[Osaka City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]] {{Coord|34|40|34.6|N|135|26|28.7|E|region:JP-27_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Ubusuna Shrine (Konohana Ward, Osaka)}} | deity = [[Amaterasu-Ōmikami]] • [[Sumiyoshi Sanjin|Sumiyoshi Ōkami]] • [[Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto]] | Shrine rank = Former Village Shrine (旧村社) | Foundation = [[Hōreki]] 12 (1762) | Main hall = | Alternate names = | Annual festival = October 16 }}
'''Ubusuna Shrine''' (産土神社, Ubusuna Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in [[Shimaya]], [[Konohana Ward]], [[Osaka City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]].
== Deities == * [[Amaterasu-Ōmikami]] (天照皇大神) * [[Sumiyoshi Sanjin|Sumiyoshi Ōkami]] (住吉大神) * [[Ukanomitama|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto]] (宇迦之御魂神)
== History == [[File:Ubusuna-jinja02.jpg|300px|thumb|Worship hall]] * consecration_year in [[Hōreki]] 12 (1762) by Shimaya Shibee for the purpose of reclamation. * In [[Meiji]] 5 (1872), designated as a village shrine. * On August 7, [[Meiji]] 44 (1911), the Kōdai Jingū in Onkishima Kitano-chō (Torijima-chō) was merged. This shrine had been enshrined in [[Genroku]] 15 (1702) by Ōmiya Jin'emon during the reclamation of Onkishima Shinden. * In [[Taishō]] 4 (1915), it was designated as a shrine eligible to receive imperial offerings. * On September 21, [[Shōwa]] 9 (1934), following damage caused by the [[Muroto Typhoon]], the shrine was relocated from its original site on the southern bank of the Shōrenji River to its current location.
== Grounds == * Konpira Shrine * Shimaya Inari Shrine * Ancestral Spirits Shrine * Ikumusubi-no-Ōkami * Sacred Shrine * Kusune Inari Ōkami
== Access == * Approximately 6 minutes on foot north from [[Ajigawa-guchi Station]] on the {{ill|JR Yumesaki Line|ja|桜島線}}.
== References == * Inoue Masao, *Osaka Prefecture Complete History* (1922) {{全国書誌番号|73012615}} * Osaka Prefecture Shinto Youth Association, *Osaka Prefecture Shrine Directory* (1971) [http://iss.ndl.go.jp/books/R100000001-I002040239-00 National Diet Library Search] {{Shinto side}} {{citation needed|Ubusuna Shrine}} [[Category:Pages to be written 2]] [[Category:Pages to be written {{Shrine | name = Ubusuna Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Ubusuna-jinja01.jpg|270px]] | location = Shimaya 3-13-28, [[Konohana Ward]], [[Osaka City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]] {{Coord|34|40|34.6|N|135|26|28.7|E|region:JP-27_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Ubusuna Shrine (Konohana Ward, Osaka)}} | deity = [[Amaterasu-Ōmikami]] • [[Sumiyoshi Sanjin|Sumiyoshi Ōkami]] • [[Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto]] | Shrine rank = Former Village Shrine (旧村社) | Foundation = [[Hōreki]] 12 (1762) | Main hall = | Alternate names = | Annual festival = October 16 }}
'''Ubusuna Shrine''' (産土神社, Ubusuna Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in [[Shimaya]], [[Konohana Ward]], [[Osaka City]], [[Osaka Prefecture]].
== Deities == * [[Amaterasu-Ōmikami]] (天照皇大神) * [[Sumiyoshi Sanjin|Sumiyoshi Ōkami]] (住吉大神) * [[Ukanomitama|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto]] (宇迦之御魂神)
== History == [[File:Ubusuna-jinja02.jpg|300px|thumb|Worship hall]] * consecration_year in [[Hōreki]] 12 (1762) by Shimaya Shibee for the purpose of reclamation. * In [[Meiji]] 5 (1872), designated as a village shrine. * On August 7, [[Meiji]] 44 (1911), the Kōdai Jingū in Onkishima Kitano-chō (Torijima-chō) was merged. This shrine had been enshrined in [[Genroku]] 15 (1702) by Ōmiya Jin'emon during the reclamation of Onkishima Shinden. * In [[Taishō]] 4 (1915), it was designated as a shrine eligible to receive imperial offerings. * On September 21, [[Shōwa]] 9 (1934), following damage caused by the [[Muroto Typhoon]], the shrine was relocated from its original site on the southern bank of the Shōrenji River to its current location.
== Grounds == * Konpira Shrine * Shimaya Inari Shrine * Ancestral Spirits Shrine * Ikumusubi-no-Ōkami * Sacred Shrine * Kusune Inari Ōkami
== Access == * Approximately 6 minutes on foot north from [[Ajigawa-guchi Station]] on the {{ill|JR Yumesaki Line|ja|桜島線}}.
== References == * Inoue Masao, *Osaka Prefecture Complete History* (1922) {{全国書誌番号|73012615}} * Osaka Prefecture Shinto Youth Association, *Osaka Prefecture Shrine Directory* (1971) [http://iss.ndl.go.jp/books/R100000001-I002040239-00 National Diet Library Search] {{Shinto side}} {{citation needed|Ubusuna Shrine}}
{{Shinto-stub}}

== Deities == * [[Amaterasu]] (天照皇大神) * [[Sumiyoshi sanjin|Sumiyoshi Ōkami]] (住吉大神) * [[Ukanomitama|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto]] (宇迦之御魂神)
== History == [[File:Ubusuna-jinja02.jpg|300px|thumb|Worship hall]] * consecration_year in [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 12 (1762) by Shimaya Shibee for the purpose of reclamation. * In [[Meiji]] 5 (1872), designated as a village shrine. * On August 7, [[Meiji]] 44 (1911), the Kōdai Jingū in Onkishima Kitano-chō (Torijima-chō) was merged. This shrine had been enshrined in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 15 (1702) by Ōmiya Jin'emon during the reclamation of Onkishima Shinden. * In [[:en:Taishō era|Taishō era]] 4 (1915), it was designated as a shrine eligible to receive imperial offerings. * On September 21, [[:en:Shōwa|Shōwa]] 9 (1934), following damage caused by the [[:en:Muroto Typhoon|Muroto Typhoon]], the shrine was relocated from its original site on the southern bank of the Shōrenji River to its current location.
== Grounds == * Konpira Shrine * Shimaya Inari Shrine * Ancestral Spirits Shrine * Ikumusubi-no-Ōkami * Sacred Shrine * Kusune Inari Ōkami
== Access == * Approximately 6 minutes on foot north from [[Ajigawa-guchi Station]] on the [[:en:Sakurajima Line|JR Yumesaki Line]].
== References == * Inoue Masao, *Osaka Prefecture Complete History* (1922) {{全国書誌番号|73012615}} * Osaka Prefecture Shinto Youth Association, *Osaka Prefecture Shrine Directory* (1971) [http://iss.ndl.go.jp/books/R100000001-I002040239-00 National Diet Library Search] {{Shinto side}}
{{Shinto-stub}}

== History == [[File:Ubusuna-jinja02.jpg|300px|thumb|Worship hall]] * consecration_year in [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 12 (1762) by Shimaya Shibee for the purpose of reclamation. * In [[Meiji]] 5 (1872), designated as a village shrine. * On August 7, [[Meiji]] 44 (1911), the Kōdai Jingū in Onkishima Kitano-chō (Torijima-chō) was merged. This shrine had been enshrined in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 15 (1702) by Ōmiya Jin'emon during the reclamation of Onkishima Shinden. * In [[:en:Taishō era|Taishō era]] 4 (1915), it was designated as a shrine eligible to receive imperial offerings. * On September 21, [[:en:Shōwa|Shōwa]] 9 (1934), following damage caused by the [[:en:Muroto Typhoon|Muroto Typhoon]], the shrine was relocated from its original site on the southern bank of the Shōrenji River to its current location.
== Grounds == * Konpira Shrine * Shimaya Inari Shrine * Ancestral Spirits Shrine * Ikumusubi-no-Ōkami * Sacred Shrine * Kusune Inari Ōkami
== Access == * Approximately 6 minutes on foot north from [[Ajigawa-guchi Station]] on the [[:en:Sakurajima Line|JR Yumesaki Line]].
== References == * Inoue Masao, *Osaka Prefecture Complete History* (1922) {{全国書誌番号|73012615}} * Osaka Prefecture Shinto Youth Association, *Osaka Prefecture Shrine Directory* (1971) [http://iss.ndl.go.jp/books/R100000001-I002040239-00 National Diet Library Search] {{Shinto side}}

This shrine had been enshrined in [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 15 (1702) by Ōmiya Jin'emon during the reclamation of Onkishima Shinden. * In [[:en:Taishō era|Taishō era]] 4 (1915), it was designated as a shrine eligible to receive imperial offerings. * On September 21, [[:en:Shōwa|Shōwa]] 9 (1934), following damage caused by the [[:en:Muroto Typhoon|Muroto Typhoon]], the shrine was relocated from its original site on the southern bank of the Shōrenji River to its current location.
== Grounds == * Konpira Shrine * Shimaya Inari Shrine * Ancestral Spirits Shrine * Ikumusubi-no-Ōkami * Sacred Shrine * Kusune Inari Ōkami
== Access == * Approximately 6 minutes on foot north from [[Ajigawa-guchi Station]] on the [[:en:Sakurajima Line|JR Yumesaki Line]].

== Deities == * [[Amaterasu]] (天照皇大神) * [[Sumiyoshi sanjin|Sumiyoshi Ōkami]] (住吉大神) * [[Ukanomitama|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto]] (宇迦之御魂神)
== History == [[File:Ubusuna-jinja02.jpg|300px|thumb|Worship hall]] * consecration_year in {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|WD=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki}} 12 (1762) by Shimaya Shibee for the purpose of reclamation. * In [[Meiji]] 5 (1872), designated as a village shrine. * On August 7, [[Meiji]] 44 (1911), the Kōdai Jingū in Onkishima Kitano-chō (Torijima-chō) was merged. This shrine had been enshrined in {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|WD=Q1325001|lt=Genroku}} 15 (1702) by Ōmiya Jin'emon during the reclamation of Onkishima Shinden. * In {{ill|Taishō era|en|Taishō era|WD=Q329174|lt=Taishō era}} 4 (1915), it was designated as a shrine eligible to receive imperial offerings. * On September 21, {{ill|Shōwa|en|Shōwa|WD=Q398996|lt=Shōwa}} 9 (1934), following damage caused by the [[:en:Muroto Typhoon|Muroto Typhoon]], the shrine was relocated from its original site on the southern bank of the Shōrenji River to its current location.
== Grounds == * Konpira Shrine * Shimaya Inari Shrine * Ancestral Spirits Shrine * Ikumusubi-no-Ōkami * Sacred Shrine * Kusune Inari Ōkami
== Access == * Approximately 6 minutes on foot north from [[Ajigawa-guchi Station]] on the {{ill|Sakurajima Line|en|Sakurajima Line|WD=Q1066239|lt=JR Yumesaki Line}}.
== References == * Inoue Masao, *Osaka Prefecture Complete History* (1922) {{全国書誌番号|73012615}} * Osaka Prefecture Shinto Youth Association, *Osaka Prefecture Shrine Directory* (1971) [http://iss.ndl.go.jp/books/R100000001-I002040239-00 National Diet Library Search] {{Shinto side}}
